_comment: Declarative manifest of the Sentry alerts that should exist for vitfix-production. Sentry has no public API to apply this directly — the manifest is the source of truth, the Sentry UI is the runtime. Each alert has a _status field reflecting the current state in the Sentry UI. Reviewed during incident post-mortems (see docs/oncall.md).

_legend.applied: Alert exists in the Sentry UI as of _version date.
_legend.pending_plan: Requires a Sentry plan upgrade (metric / performance alerts not on the free tier). Track upgrade decision in docs/slos.md error budget review.
_legend.pending_setup: Requires upstream wiring (e.g. cron heartbeat tagging) before the alert can fire — author is captured in `_blocked_on`.

alerts.title: Simulateur V2 — Hallucinations bloquées en pic (>5/min)
Availability drop — /api/health 5xx
alerts._blocked_on: Sentry free tier does not allow Number of Errors / metric alerts. Requires Team plan ($26/mo) or Business plan.

alerts.title: 5xx rate spike — > 5/min on /api/*
alerts._blocked_on: Same as availability_drop — requires Sentry plan upgrade.

alerts.title: API p95 latency > 3s sustained
alerts._blocked_on: Performance alert — requires Sentry plan upgrade.

alerts.title: Agent latency p95 > 5s (fixy-ai / devis*)
alerts._blocked_on: Performance alert — requires Sentry plan upgrade.

alerts.title: Cron missed scheduled run
alerts._blocked_on: Migration 102 (cron_heartbeats) was applied 2026-05-07. The Sentry-side issue alert can be created once the post-deploy ships and crons start emitting heartbeats — at which point we'll have a concrete tag value to match.

alerts.title: Stripe webhook signature verification failed
alerts._blocked_on: Subsumed by `stripe_webhook_error` alert (any error in the webhook module pages, signature failure included). Keep this entry for traceability — if we need a dedicated P1 we'll switch the parent to a more specific filter.

alerts.title: Stripe webhook events idle > 24h
alerts._blocked_on: Need a daily cron that scans stripe_webhook_events for idle > 24h rows and emits a tagged Sentry message. Cron not yet wired.

alerts.title: Groq circuit breaker stayed OPEN > 5 min
alerts._blocked_on: logger.circuitState() helper landed in Phase 8 but no production code calls it yet — the circuit breaker state transitions need to be instrumented (one-line edit per breaker).

alerts.title: Mass cancel detected on devis/factures
alerts._blocked_on: Tag emission is documented in docs/conformite/sentry-alerts.md but the SQL trigger or cron that detects mass-cancel and emits the tag is not yet shipped.

alerts.title: Hash chain integrity broken (devis or factures)
alerts._blocked_on: Same — tag emission is documented but the verification job that detects chain breaks and emits the tag is not yet shipped.
